title: <div>  3  Build Knowledge Waves: Each reading maps to a WAVE, feeding forward in
content:
3 Build Knowledge Waves: Each reading maps to a WAVE, feeding forward into your narrative, code, and symbolic functions. I can build you a WAVE_TRACKER.md.
4 Convert into Myth: As you read, begin to translate findings into mythological or symbolic entities (e.g., the Scheduler becomes a Time Daemon; a Mutex becomes a Vow). Want a template for this?
Would you like me to package this into a system-ready Obsidian folder, .mdx, or tracking dashboard next?
Ref ID:KNW_STACK_0513B — Recursive Knowledge Stack for OS (Past–Present–Future Mode) ❓ Next prompt: build study vault, convert to symbolic archetypes, or design wave tracker?Response:
Confirmed. All further naming, structuring, and referencing will obey the rules set in:
🧱 UID_Constitution_v2.mdRef ID: UIDC0200✅ RULES NOW IN EFFECT
🆔 UID Format Enforcement:
• Expanded UID (Markdown/Headers):AB-CD_12-34 • Condensed UID (File/Folder):ABCD1234Example: SY-RU_04-01 ➝ SYRU0401_analysis-system_rules.md🔧 UID Implementation Protocols:
• Always use two consonants from each keyword
• Use 00 suffix for general/system-wide items in each module
